top_signals.title: Trump administration's head of AI safety agency resigns after 3 months on job
top_signals.summary: Arvind Raman, the director of National Institute of Standards and Technology, will serve as acting director of CAISI, according to a spokesperson
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
top_signals.summary: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
